description_long: This is a rectangular office desk with a flat, light gray surface that slightly overhangs the edges, giving it a modern and practical appearance. The desk features a solid front panel and two sturdy side panels, providing stability and a sense of enclosure. On the right side, there is a set of three drawers with black handles, offering organized storage space for office supplies or documents. The left side is open beneath the tabletop, allowing ample legroom for a seated user. The materials appear to be a combination of laminated wood or particleboard for the main structure and metal or plastic for the drawer handles. The overall design is functional and suitable for professional or administrative environments.
description: A modern rectangular office desk with a light gray top, solid front panel, and three right-side drawers with black handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid front panel and the overhanging light gray tabletop.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the continuous front panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the three drawers with black handles on the right and open legroom on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid side panel and the overhanging tabletop.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with open legroom and accessible drawers on the right, while the solid panel forms the front.
attribute_usage_context: writing or computer workstation in an office setting
